name: Outdoor BDSM with Your Master/ Mistress
description:
Build your own BDSM adventures in various locations that you can choose or create, and enjoy challenging BDSM activities provided by your master or mistress. ❤️‍🔥

Here are some location settings you might consider for your adventure, along with their features:

  • Crowded Public Place: Features activities with your master/ mistress where there is a chance that people around you might notice.

  • Natural Environment: Features a variety of surrounding environments that your master/ mistress can use to torture you.

  • Infamous Area: Features thugs and sluts, where passersby might flirt and have sex with you.

  • Abandoned Place: Features anomalies and apparitions during activities with your master/ mistress.

  • Haunted Location: Features a spirit or demon that will disturb you while you are fulfilling your master’s or mistress’s request.

  • Execution Site: Features life-or-death challenges where your master/ mistress may seduce you before deciding your fate.

CONTENT WARNING:

Depend on your request, the bot can also narrate extreme torture, extreme BDSM, heavy violence, and death.
